title: List of fancy Buenos Aires apartment buildings

validation.sourceNotes: Initial list extracted manually from local-text/ba-fancy-buildings.md into this JSON. The page does not import or parse the Markdown file.
validation.duplicateMerge: Madero Plaza and Terrazas de Puerto Madero are represented as one merged building-complex entry because the source markdown called out that likely duplication.
validation.addressSource: Maps/geocoding APIs, with manual corrections when the first result was a route, landmark or wrong municipality.
validation.availabilitySource: Web search batches, regular web search, targeted Airbnb/site searches and prior Palermo-specific research rerun or reviewed on 2026-06-30.
validation.airbnbRule: Airbnb is marked confirmed only when a search result explicitly named the building or exact address. Generic neighborhood Airbnb results are ignored.
validation.localRentalAdSource: Representative direct rental, temporary-rental, short-term rental, or Airbnb pages. Generic search result pages, sale-only pages, developer pages, unavailable pages, and nearby comparables are not used as sufficient rental evidence.
validation.longTermRentSource: Monthly USD rent estimates target a standard 1-bedroom / 2-ambientes apartment. Direct standard 1BR listings are used where visible; larger, oversized, furnished, temporary, ARS-priced, or otherwise non-standard rental pages are extrapolated to an approximate standard 1BR comparison price.
validation.officialNameSource: Official or stronger public names were preferred where Google Places, developer pages, or rental snippets supported them. Address-only names remain where no official building name was found.
validation.includedRule: Included buildings have at least one direct long-term rental, temporary rental, short-term rental, or Airbnb page. The list also includes verified residential Buenos Aires buildings with 29 or more floors, regardless of amenities, when an active rental or Airbnb link was found.
validation.lastAudit: Follow-up audit on 2026-06-30 checked description quality, Airbnb matches, 1BR USD rent estimates and whether rental links pointed to rental inventory.
validation.lastPalermoAudit: Added 26 non-duplicate Palermo-area buildings on 2026-06-30 after checking for gym, pool, radiant-floor heating and rental availability.
validation.lastRentalPageAudit: Removed 20 buildings on 2026-06-30 because no single clear rental page, short-term rental page, or Airbnb page was available; generic search pages and nearby comparables were not treated as enough evidence.
validation.lastPriceNormalization: On 2026-06-30, large-format or larger-unit rental evidence was normalized to approximate standard 1BR rents for objective building-by-building price comparison. The original rental URLs remain as source evidence.
validation.lastAirbnbUrlNormalization: On 2026-06-30, Airbnb URLs were normalized to the https://www.airbnb.com host while preserving room paths and query strings.
validation.lastTallBuildingAudit: On 2026-06-30, SkyscraperPage and Skyscraper Center were used to audit Buenos Aires residential buildings with 29 or more floors. Missing buildings were added only when BrightData search/scrape found a direct active rental or Airbnb page.
validation.floorCountSource: Floor counts were added on 2026-06-30 from SkyscraperPage Buenos Aires index, targeted BrightData Google searches, and direct listing/developer snippets. Null means no reliable total floor count or 20+ floor evidence was found during the audit.
validation.lastTwoBedroomAreaAudit: Re-checked approxTwoBedroomAreaSqm for buildings added in the prior ~24h using BrightData past-sales evidence (2026-07-21). Revised Palmera Caballito 55→73, Quartier Boulevard 80→90, Oceana 110→126, Almarena/Distrito Quartier 70→115, Harbour Residences 85→110, Art María 90→120, Faena Residences 90→156, Palacio Estrugamou 150→162, Torres El Mirador 95→100, Torres River View 112→122. Confirmed Forum Alcorta 120, Alto Palermo 110, MilAires 75, YOO Nordelta 95. Torres Aisenson Belgrano kept 120 as a notional 2BR (tower sales are full-floor ~200–300 m² only).
validation.lastUsableInventoryAdd: Added Palmera Caballito, Quartier Boulevard, Torres Alto Palermo, Forum Alcorta, Torres Aisenson and Oceana Puerto Madero on 2026-07-21 after BrightData verification of priced long-term rental inventory with extractable size. Skipped Torre Camps (no live priced rental/Airbnb), Harbour Tower (sale/en pozo only), and Osten Tower II (under construction / no priced rental inventory).
validation.lastListingGapFill: 2026-07-21 BrightData gap-fill for buildings added in prior ~24h: added priced long-term rentals for Faena Residences, Quartier Boulevard (×2), Oceana, Art María, Torres River View, Torres Alto Palermo, Palmera Caballito, Harbour Residences, and Forum Alcorta (×3). Airbnb candidates without extractable monthly USD were not added.
validation.blacklistRule: Buildings listed in blacklistedBuildings must never be re-added to buildings[], even if priced rental or Airbnb inventory is found. Match by id, name, or aliases.
validation.lastBlacklist: Removed Alma Palermo (alma-palermo), and blacklisted it on 2026-07-21 by explicit user request.
validation.lastRequestedInventoryAdd: Added L'Avenue Libertador, Torre Libérateur and Human Abasto Towers on 2026-07-21 after BrightData verified live long-term rentals with extractable monthly pricing and unit size. Excluded Osten Tower, Osten Tower II, Udaondo, Aura Núñez, Sky Upgrade and DOME Torre Arcos because no live exact-building Airbnb or direct long-term rental with extractable price and size survived verification.
validation.ageBlacklistRule: Buildings constructed in the 1980s or 1990s must not be added to buildings[]. Decó Recoleta is an explicit exception and must remain.
validation.lastAgeBlacklist: Removed and blacklisted Quartier de Oro, Libertador 336, Libertador 380, Libertador 4444, Torres Aisenson and Le Parc Figueroa Alcorta on 2026-07-21. Le Parc was included because its construction spans the 1990s–2000s. Kept Decó Recoleta by explicit exception.
validation.lastRecentBuildingAudit: Re-audited all nine buildings added in the prior two hours on 2026-07-21. Added newly priced exact-building Airbnbs for Almarena Puerto Retiro, Oceana Puerto Madero and Human Abasto Towers. Long-term search hits were already represented, duplicate syndications, stale, or unavailable. Rechecked 2BR areas against sold and current exact-building sales: MilAires 75 m², Almarena/Distrito Quartier 115 m², Palmera Caballito 73 m², Quartier Boulevard 90 m², Forum Alcorta 120 m², Oceana 126 m², L'Avenue 172 m², Torre Libérateur ~90 m² extrapolated, and Human Abasto 82 m² representative.
validation.lastManualBlacklist: Removed Alma Palermo (alma-palermo), and blacklisted it on 2026-07-21 by explicit user request.
validation.lastRecentCompletionGapFill: Added OM Recoleta (2025), Alpha Núñez (2025), Life Barrancas (2025), My Residence (2024) and Alma Palermo (2024) on 2026-07-21 after BrightData verification of completion years and live priced rental/temporary-rental pages. Skipped Velvet Casa Campos (2023 inauguration confirmed, but no live priced rental/Airbnb page survived verification — only sales and a delisted Roomix rental). Skipped Vista Belgrano Tower (Airbnb/rental exist, but construction evidence points to ~2020 rather than 2023–2026). Skipped Lezica OWN Residences (finalized 2025, sale-only / no live rental). Skipped Filum Recoleta (en pozo / delivery ~2027).
validation.lastGoogleMapsGeocode: On 2026-07-21, geocoded buildings added in the prior ~36h with GOOGLE_MAPS_API_KEY_PRIVATE (Places Find Place / Geocoding). Filled missing googlePlaceId, location, fullAddress and googleMapsUrl. Alpha Núñez uses the exact Vuelta de Obligado 3928 street-address place (no named Places entry). Rejected Aura Núñez false positive. Kept existing Faena Residences place id (rejected temporary-rental listing place).
validation.lastFiveBuildingAreaAirbnbRentalAudit: Audited OM Recoleta, Alpha Núñez, Life Barrancas, My Residence and Alma Palermo on 2026-07-21: refreshed approx 2BR m² from past-sale evidence (OM 107 via ML; My Residence 96 via RE/MAX; Alma 42 via Argenprop; Life Barrancas 146 covered kept; Alpha ~75 medium kept — no clean 3-amb sale m²). Added missed Airbnb for My Residence (1) and Alma Palermo (2). Added missed/extra long-term rental overlays for OM (ZP USD 1,250 2-amb + Roomix USD 3,750 4-amb), Alpha (Martin Prop ARS 850k studio syndication), and My Residence (Argenprop USD 700 studio syndication). No Airbnb found for OM / Alpha / Life Barrancas.
validation.lastSixBuildingBookingGapFill: Added Portal Arévalo, Beruti 3062, Pont Bleu, Aventura Julián Álvarez 1205, AER Julián Álvarez 1253 and Junín 1435. Prefer Airbnb Magno/Pont Bleu/AER/Beruti listings; Booking.com used as Airbnb-column fallback for Aventura 1205 and Junín 1435 (and supplementary for Pont Bleu / AER). Live priced long-term rental added for Pont Bleu; others lacked stable direct long-term URLs.
validation.minOneBedroomAreaRule: Buildings whose typical 1-bedroom / 2-ambientes area is under 60 m² must not remain in buildings[]. Blacklist them so they are not re-added.
validation.lastMinOneBedroomAreaPurge: Removed and blacklisted 9 buildings on 2026-07-22 for typical 1BR area under 60 m²: aer-julian-alvarez, avellaneda-260, aventura-julian-alvarez, beruti-3062, junin-1435, madero-urbano, pont-bleu, portal-arevalo, torre-liberateur.
validation.lastListingCountPurge: 2026-07-22: Listing-count rule + agent follow-up. Restored dome-green-soho, lumiere-urbano, torre-centenario-diaz-velez-4924, torre-nic-baez-600, torre-lumiere-palermo. Removed torre-union (Isadora false hits) and boulevard-san-isidro-vilela (Roomix delisted → only 1 live rental). Left removed: demaria-4700, life-barrancas, torre-deco-segui, torre-quantum-palermo, torres-de-gelly.
